name: Main Company
description: Company-context surface. Posts scoped to the user's employer ('My Company') or followed companies ('Following'). Distinguished from Home by an explicit company-scope chip row directly under the tabs and a collapsible 'Overview' callout that orients new arrivals. Feed posts carry a category eyebrow ('HOT' coral, 'ALL TIME BEST' blue) above the author row.

scope.note: Company-scope chip row. The lock leading icon on the active chip signals private/employee-only scope — preserve when modeling.

props.title: Overview
props.body: Company-wide updates, reviews, and pulse data live here. Tap to collapse.

overview.note: Collapsible Overview callout. Soft surface, not modal. Trailing chevron-down collapses the body.

items.title: Compensation thread — Q2
items.body: Numbers compared to last cycle and the senior bands.

items.title: How I negotiated my offer
items.body: A long thread on prep, anchors, and what worked.

body.note: Feed items carry an `eyebrow` slot above the author row. HOT eyebrow renders in `sys.color.brand`; ALL TIME BEST renders in `sys.color.primary`. Do not bake into the title string. A '▾ RECENT' collapsible section header sits above the feed; treat as a feed-level section header, not a tab.

rules: Category eyebrow ('HOT', 'ALL TIME BEST') is above the author row — not inside the title string. Treat as a feed-post eyebrow slot or `chip/tag` variant.
Lock-leading on the active company chip indicates private/employee-only scope — preserve.
'▾ RECENT' is a collapsible section header, not a `tabs/*` set. Do not swap in a tab variant here.
